installConfirm.title: Stop Service Confirmation
installConfirm.description: Hagicode service is currently running. Installation or reinstallation requires stopping the service.

warnings.stopService: Stop the currently running Hagicode service

installConfirm.manualRestart: After installation completes, you will need to manually restart the service.

dependencyStartConfirm.title: Start Service Confirmation
dependencyStartConfirm.description: The current version is missing the following required dependencies:
dependencyStartConfirm.risksTitle: Starting the service without these dependencies may result in:
dependencyStartConfirm.confirmation: Do you still want to start the service?

dependencyWarningBanner.title: Warning: Service dependencies not fully satisfied
dependencyWarningBanner.description: Currently missing {{count}} required dependencies. Some features may not work properly.

packageManagement.cardDescription: Manage the installation of web service packages
packageManagement.reinstallConfirmMessage: You are about to reinstall version {{version}}. This operation will:
packageManagement.reinstallConfirmDownloadInstall: Download and install the package again
packageManagement.noPackagesMessage: No packages available. Make sure the package source directory exists at:

webServiceStatus.cardDescription: View and manage web service running status

notInstalledAlert.title: Package not installed
notInstalledAlert.message: The web service package is not installed yet. Please install the package first from the Package Management section, then return here to start the service.

noVersionAlert.title: No Active Version
noVersionAlert.message: No active version found. Please install and activate a version first from the Version Management page.

versionNotReadyAlert.title: Version Not Ready
versionNotReadyAlert.message: The active version is missing required dependencies. Please check the Dependency Management page for details.

startupFailureDialog.title: Startup Failure Log
startupFailureDialog.emptyLog: No startup log output is available
startupFailureDialog.truncatedHint: Output is truncated to the most recent log content.

toast.noActiveVersion: No active version is selected for Web logs
toast.openLogsSuccess: Active version Web logs folder opened
toast.logsNotFound: Active version Web logs folder not found
toast.openLogsError: Failed to open active version Web logs folder

listenAddress.label: Listening Address
listenAddress.description: Choose how Desktop binds the embedded web service while it is stopped.
listenAddress.wildcardHint: `0.0.0.0` binds every interface. Desktop still opens the local client through `127.0.0.1`.
listenAddress.localOnlyHint: Changes take effect the next time the local service starts.

localhost.label: localhost
localhost.description: Best for the built-in WebView and browser on this machine.

loopback.description: Use an explicit IPv4 loopback address for local-only access.

wildcard.description: Bind every local interface so other devices on the LAN can connect.

custom.label: Custom IP
custom.description: Bind one specific IPv4 interface, such as a dedicated LAN adapter.

dependencyManagement.title: System Dependencies
dependencyManagement.description: Check and manage system runtime dependencies required by the web service

manualHandoff.title: Desktop ships Node.js and npm, but this CLI package now requires a manual install step.
manualHandoff.description: Run the suggested command outside Desktop, then refresh the dependency status here.
manualHandoff.refreshHint: Refresh after the command finishes to re-check the bundled toolchain.

packageSource.cardDescription: Configure and manage package sources for installation

folder.notFound: Folder does not exist or is not accessible

indexUrl.label: Index URL
indexUrl.hint: The index file must contain a versions array and assets for each version

packageSource.confirmRemove: Confirm removal of this package source?

error.loadFailed: Failed to load package source configuration
error.saveFailed: Failed to save package source configuration

blogFeed.title: Hagicode Blog
blogFeed.error: Failed to load, please try again later
